summary: Iteration 69 - Complete testing of NeXify AI improvements: Proactive Mode, Chat Scroll Fix, Agent CRUD, Design Harmonization. ALL BACKEND TESTS PASSED (15/15). ALL UI TESTS PASSED.
seed_data_creation: None - used existing data, test agents cleaned up
context_for_next_testing_agent: All features verified working. Proactive Mode has 4 tasks (morning_briefing, lead_analysis, brain_maintenance, health_check). Chat scroll containment working. Design harmonization applied (h2=1.125rem/18px, table th color=gray/muted). Nav items use data-testid='nav-{id}' where id matches view name (leads, calendar, customers, agents, nexify_ai).
